headline: Is It Time To Reassess Trade Desk (TTD) After A 57% One Year Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Trade Desk's current share price reflects its true worth, starting with a clear view of value drivers can help you frame your next move. The stock recently closed at US$23.55, with returns of a 13.7% decline over 7 days, an 8.8% decline over 30 days, a 37.5% decline year to date, and a 57.4% decline over 1 year. Recent coverage has focused on Trade Desk's role within digital advertising and how investor sentiment around ad spend and platform adoption is feeding...

headline: Why is The Trade Desk Betting Big on AI to Power Its Core Advantage?
summary: TTD doubles down on AI with Kokai, aiming to sharpen ad performance, boost productivity and cement its edge in a competitive digital ad market.

headline: 2 Mid-Cap Stocks for Long-Term Investors and 1 We Avoid
summary: Mid-cap stocks have the best odds of scaling into $100 billion corporations thanks to their tested business models and large addressable markets. But the many opportunities in front of them attract significant competition, spanning from industry behemoths with seemingly infinite resources to small, nimble players with chips on their shoulders.

headline: Powell's Inflation Warning Hammers Wall Street — But Not Everyone Is Crying
summary: The Fed held rates steady, oil pushed past $110, and Jerome Powell left no room for optimism about near-term rate cuts. Yet buried beneath another ugly session for the major indices was a handful of stocks that refused to roll over and one chipmaker that quietly delivered the earnings report of the year.
